languages.English: If enabled, a more compact vertex format will be used for rendering chunks. This can reduce graphics memory usage and bandwidth requirements significantly, especially for integrated graphics cards, but can cause z-fighting with some resource packs due to how it reduces the precision of position and texture coordinate attributes. Disabling this has no effect if Oculus is installed.
languages.简体中文: 启用后，游戏将使用更紧凑的顶点格式来渲染区块。这可以显著减少显存使用和带宽需求，尤其是对于集成显卡而言。但是，由于它降低了位置和纹理坐标属性的精度，可能会导致一些资源包出现深度冲突（z-fighting）的问题。
languages.繁體中文: If enabled, a more compact vertex format will be used for rendering chunks. This can reduce graphics memory usage and bandwidth requirements significantly, especially for integrated graphics cards, but can cause z-fighting with some resource packs due to how it reduces the precision of position and texture coordinate attributes. Disabling this has no effect if Oculus is installed.

languages.English:
Controls 
 
 Click and drag to scroll the map. 
 Scroll the mouse wheel to zoom in and out (CTRL for precise).

 Right-click a map element (e.g. waypoint) for options. 
 %1$sClick here to edit the key bindings.

languages.English: Pipe Networks can now pull the fluid from the drains' internal buffer

languages.繁體中文: 現在流體網路可以抽取分液池中的流體了

languages.English: Right-click it to pour fluids from your held item into it

languages.繁體中文: 點擊右鍵可以把你手上的流體倒進去

languages.English: When items are inserted from the side...
Item Drains can extract fluids from items

languages.繁體中文: 分液池可以從流體容器中清空抽取流體

languages.English: Right-click a Stock link before placement to connect to its network

languages.繁體中文: 放置前右鍵單擊一個庫存鏈路以和整個網絡連接

languages.English: Just like Stock tickers, Redstone requesters can order items from the logistics network

languages.繁體中文: 與庫存終端類似，紅石請求器可以從物流網絡中請求物品

languages.繁體中文: 右鍵單擊紅石請求器來打開它的配置界面

languages.English: The order set in the UI will be requested on every redstone pulse

languages.繁體中文: 每次紅石脈衝都會請求界面中設置的訂單

languages.English: Alternatively, the requester can be fully configured before placement
languages.简体中文: 或者，红石请求器可以在放置之前进行完全配置
languages.繁體中文: 或者，紅石請求器可以在放置之前進行完全配置

languages.English: Right-click a Stock keeper with it and set the desired order there

languages.繁體中文: 右擊倉庫管理員並設置所需要的訂單

languages.English: Data may be inaccurate due to protocol size limits.

languages.繁體中文: 資料會因協議大小限制而造成不準確。

languages.English: Add your Schematic here. Make sure it is deployed at a specific location.
languages.简体中文: 在此处添加你的蓝图，务必确保其已经被部署在特定位置
languages.繁體中文: 在此處放置你的藍圖，務必確保其已被部署在特定位置

languages.English: _Applies_ the _configured_ _recipe_ with matching Ingredients found in your _Inventory_. _Sneak_ to craft up to a _Stack_ of items.
languages.简体中文: 使用_物品栏_中的物品制作_设置好的配方_，_潜行_可以一次合成_一组_
languages.繁體中文: 根據_物品欄_內的物品_使用_這個_配方_合成。_潛行右鍵_可以一次合成_一組_的物品。

languages.English: Opens a _Crafting_ _menu_ allowing you to _configure_ a _recipe_ and items to display.
languages.简体中文: 打开一个_配方设置界面_，用于_设置_一个_合成配方_以及展示的物品。
languages.繁體中文: 開啟_合成介面_讓你_指定配方_和要顯示的物品。

languages.English: Ride a Train through a portal

languages.English: Right-Click with Dye to change their display colour

languages.English: When turned on, leaves will be treated as solid for culling purposes. This can improve performance in forests, but also cause visual issues. Useful when setting 'See-Through Leaves' to Off, or using a bushy leaves resource pack.
languages.简体中文: When turned on, leaves will be treated as solid for culling purposes. This can improve performance in forests, but also cause visual issues. Useful when setting 'See-Through Leaves' to Off, or using a bushy leaves resource pack.
languages.繁體中文: When turned on, leaves will be treated as solid for culling purposes. This can improve performance in forests, but also cause visual issues. Useful when setting 'See-Through Leaves' to Off, or using a bushy leaves resource pack.

Backpack becomes indestructible

languages.English:
Errors in currently selected data packs prevented the world from loading.
You can either try to load it with only the vanilla data pack ("safe mode"), or go back to the title screen and fix it manually.
languages.简体中文:
当前选中的数据包中出现了错误，导致世界无法加载。
你可以尝试仅加载原版数据包（“安全模式”）或回到标题屏幕手动修复该问题。
languages.繁體中文:
目前選擇的資料包中發生錯誤，導致世界無法載入。
您可以嘗試只載入原版資料包（「安全模式」）或是回到標題畫面手動修復。

languages.English:
The cave mode type to use when cave mode is enabled. 
 
 OFF - display above ground even when cave mode is automatically or manually enabled (same as old world map versions without cave mode) 
 Layered - separate cave maps into multiple layers depending on the used top Y 
 Full - ignore the used top Y, use a single layer for cave maps and map everything from the world top to the world bottom
languages.简体中文:
The cave mode type to use when cave mode is enabled. 
 
 OFF - display above ground even when cave mode is automatically or manually enabled (same as old world map versions without cave mode) 
 Layered - separate cave maps into multiple layers depending on the used top Y 
 Full - ignore the used top Y, use a single layer for cave maps and map everything from the world top to the world bottom
languages.繁體中文:
The cave mode type to use when cave mode is enabled. 
 
 OFF - display above ground even when cave mode is automatically or manually enabled (same as old world map versions without cave mode) 
 Layered - separate cave maps into multiple layers depending on the used top Y 
 Full - ignore the used top Y, use a single layer for cave maps and map everything from the world top to the world bottom

languages.简体中文:
此屏幕的内容由第三方服务器或地图控制，不由Mojang Studios或Microsoft拥有、运营和监督。

languages.English:
Manual - you are asked to select and confirm the world map every time you switch worlds or dimensions. 
 
 World Spawn - the world map is selected and confirmed automatically based on the world spawn point that the game client is aware of. Can break if the server is using the vanilla compass item for a custom function. 
 
 Single - each dimension has a single world map that is automatically confirmed. Useful for simple servers with a single world. 
 
 Server - install the world map mod on the server side to use this automatic mode.
languages.简体中文:
Manual - you are asked to select and confirm the world map every time you switch worlds or dimensions. 
 
 World Spawn - the world map is selected and confirmed automatically based on the world spawn point that the game client is aware of. Can break if the server is using the vanilla compass item for a custom function. 
 
 Single - each dimension has a single world map that is automatically confirmed. Useful for simple servers with a single world. 
 
 Server - install the world map mod on the server side to use this automatic mode.
languages.繁體中文:
Manual - you are asked to select and confirm the world map every time you switch worlds or dimensions. 
 
 World Spawn - the world map is selected and confirmed automatically based on the world spawn point that the game client is aware of. Can break if the server is using the vanilla compass item for a custom function. 
 
 Single - each dimension has a single world map that is automatically confirmed. Useful for simple servers with a single world. 
 
 Server - install the world map mod on the server side to use this automatic mode.

languages.English:
This event is paired with the World Loaded event to calculate how long the world session has lasted.
The duration (in seconds and ticks) is measured when a world session has ended (quitting to title, disconnecting from a server).

此事件与世界加载事件用于计算世界会话的持续时间。
持续时间（以秒和刻为单位）在世界会话结束时（退回到标题屏幕，或从服务器断开连接）测量。

持續時間（單位為秒和刻）在遊玩結束時（回到標題畫面，或是從伺服器中斷連線）測量。

languages.English:
%s graphics uses screen shaders for drawing weather, clouds, and particles behind translucent blocks and water.
This may severely impact performance for portable devices and 4K displays.
languages.简体中文:
%s画质使用屏幕着色器绘制天气、云以及半透明方块和水后面的粒子。
这也许会在便携设备和4K显示屏上造成严重的性能负担。
languages.繁體中文:
%s 畫質使用畫面著色器來繪製透明方塊與 水後方的天氣、雲以及粒子。
此選項可能會嚴重影響使用行動裝置或是 4K 解析度時的效能。

languages.English:
Enable Forge to queue all chunk updates to the Chunk Update thread.
May increase FPS significantly, but may also cause weird rendering lag.
Not recommended for computers without a significant number of cores available.
languages.简体中文: 启用此选项后，Forge会将所有区块更新加入独立的区块更新线程。此选项或能大幅提升FPS，但同时也有可能产生奇怪的渲染卡顿。不推荐在可用核心数低的电脑上启用此选项。
languages.繁體中文: 啟用以讓 Forge 將所有區塊更新列隊於區塊更新執行緒。應能大幅提升 FPS，但也有可能造成奇怪的渲染卡頓。不建議用於可用核心數較少的電腦上。

languages.English: If enabled, only the sides of blocks which are facing the camera will be submitted for rendering. This can eliminate a large number of block faces very early in the rendering process, saving memory bandwidth and time on the GPU. Some resource packs may have issues with this option, so try disabling it if you're seeing holes in blocks.

languages.简体中文: 切制焦黑熔渣砖块楼梯

languages.English: Vanilla will treat crafting recipes using empty tags as air, and allow you to craft with nothing in that slot. This changes empty tags to use BARRIER as the item. To prevent crafting with air.
languages.简体中文: 原版将使用空标签的处理配方，且并不允许您合成该槽位中的任何内容。如果该选项为false，则此项更改中的空标签会使用屏障作为物品。目的是防止使用空气合成。
languages.繁體中文: 原版將使用空標籤的處理配方，且不允許您合成該槽位中的任何內容。如果該選項為false，則此項更改中的空標籤會使用屏障作為物品。目的是防止使用空氣合成

languages.English: If enabled, chunks which are determined to be fully hidden by fog effects will not be rendered, helping to improve performance. The improvement can be more dramatic when fog effects are heavier (such as while underwater), but it may cause undesirable visual artifacts between the sky and fog in some scenarios.

The improvement can be more dramatic when fog effects are heavier (such as while underwater), but it may cause undesirable visual artifacts between the sky and fog in some scenarios.
languages.繁體中文: If enabled, chunks which are determined to be fully hidden by fog effects will not be rendered, helping to improve performance. languages.English:
Minecraft has run out of memory.

This could be caused by a bug in the game or by the Java Virtual Machine not being allocated enough memory.

To prevent level corruption, the current game has quit. We've tried to free up enough memory to let you go back to the main menu and back to playing, but this may not have worked.

Please restart the game if you see this message again.
languages.简体中文:
Minecraft已耗尽内存。

原因可能是游戏存在漏洞，或分配给Java虚拟机的内存过少。

为避免世界损坏，当前游戏已退出。我们已尝试腾出内存，让你可以回到主菜单并继续游戏，但这不一定奏效。

如果你再次看见此消息，请重启游戏。
languages.繁體中文:
Minecraft 記憶體不足。

可能是由於遊戲錯誤，或配置給 Java 虛擬機器的記憶體不足。

為防止世界損毀，已結束目前遊戲。我們已嘗試釋放記憶體，讓您返回主選單並繼續遊玩，但這個方法也可能無法解決問題。

如果您再次看到此訊息，請重新啟動遊戲。

languages.English:
Collecting this data helps us improve Minecraft by guiding us in directions that are relevant to our players.
You can also send in additional feedback to help us keep improving Minecraft.
languages.简体中文:
收集这些数据可以让我们了解与玩家有关的实际情况，以便帮助我们改进Minecraft。
你也可以发送其他反馈来帮助我们持续改进Minecraft。

收集以下資料有助於讓我們了解與玩家相關的實際情形，進而幫助我們改進 Minecraft。
您也可以傳送額外的意見回饋來幫助我們持續改進 Minecraft。

languages.English: Reload and resave all regions on the map without having to manually visit them. World save maps will be converted into normal map data saved to a separate map instance "Converted World Save", stored in the folder "cm$converted", which can be transferred to multiplayer map instances for the same world, using file manager. The reloading process will work in the background and turn off when it's done. It is important to note that going to another dimension will pause it until you come back and changing maps will fully cancel it.
languages.简体中文: Reload and resave all regions on the map without having to manually visit them. World save maps will be converted into normal map data saved to a separate map instance "Converted World Save", stored in the folder "cm$converted", which can be transferred to multiplayer map instances for the same world, using file manager. The reloading process will work in the background and turn off when it's done. It is important to note that going to another dimension will pause it until you come back and changing maps will fully cancel it.
languages.繁體中文: Reload and resave all regions on the map without having to manually visit them. World save maps will be converted into normal map data saved to a separate map instance "Converted World Save", stored in the folder "cm$converted", which can be transferred to multiplayer map instances for the same world, using file manager. The reloading process will work in the background and turn off when it's done. It is important to note that going to another dimension will pause it until you come back and changing maps will fully cancel it.

languages.English: Some servers put custom values in the world heightmaps, which can cause incorrectly rendered maps. Sometimes it can even happen in heavily modded singleplayer worlds. This option should fix such issues at the expense of a bit of performance. Do not use unless you need to. Reenter the world after toggling the option! Stored per world/server, not part of the config profile.

languages.English: You are trying to teleport to a map that is not connected to the current confirmed/auto one. If you are sure that this map is from your current sub-server/world save, then you can enable teleportation by adding a connection in the map selection screen -> Connect. But beware, if you connect unrelated maps and teleport, then there is a good chance you will suffocate in a block or die from fall damage, so be careful and connect only the right ones.
languages.简体中文: You are trying to teleport to a map that is not connected to the current confirmed/auto one. If you are sure that this map is from your current sub-server/world save, then you can enable teleportation by adding a connection in the map selection screen -> Connect. But beware, if you connect unrelated maps and teleport, then there is a good chance you will suffocate in a block or die from fall damage, so be careful and connect only the right ones.

If you are sure that this map is from your current sub-server/world save, then you can enable teleportation by adding a connection in the map selection screen -> Connect. languages.English: A single pixel on the map can contain multiple transparent layers and an opaque block under them. In older non-cache map data files, only the Y level (height) of the opaque block is stored in such cases, which often makes it unsafe to blindly teleport to the stored Y coordinate. When this setting is ON, the mod treats such map pixels as it would undiscovered chunks. It defaults to 2D waypoints and disables direct teleportation to such pixels. Disable this at your own risk!
languages.简体中文: A single pixel on the map can contain multiple transparent layers and an opaque block under them. In older non-cache map data files, only the Y level (height) of the opaque block is stored in such cases, which often makes it unsafe to blindly teleport to the stored Y coordinate. When this setting is ON, the mod treats such map pixels as it would undiscovered chunks. It defaults to 2D waypoints and disables direct teleportation to such pixels. Disable this at your own risk!
languages.繁體中文: A single pixel on the map can contain multiple transparent layers and an opaque block under them. In older non-cache map data files, only the Y level (height) of the opaque block is stored in such cases, which often makes it unsafe to blindly teleport to the stored Y coordinate. When this setting is ON, the mod treats such map pixels as it would undiscovered chunks. It defaults to 2D waypoints and disables direct teleportation to such pixels. Disable this at your own risk!

languages.简体中文:

當父級部件處理連接時，此處即為拼圖方塊嘗試連接到目標部件的順序。

拼圖方塊會依照優先順序由高到低處理，若優先順序相同，則依隨機順序處理。

languages.English:
Mojang implements certain procedures to help protect children and their privacy including complying with the Children’s Online Privacy Protection Act (COPPA) and General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR).

You may need to obtain parental consent before accessing your Realms account.

If you have an older Minecraft account (you log in with your username), you need to migrate the account to a Mojang account in order to access Realms.
languages.简体中文:
Mojang实施许多方法来促进儿童及其隐私权的保护，包括履行《儿童在线隐私权保护法案》（COPPA）与《通用数据保护条例》（GDPR）。

在访问你的Realms账户之前，你可能需要征得父母的同意。

如果你拥有的是旧版的Minecraft账户（登录时使用用户名），你需要将其合并到Mojang账户以访问Realms。
languages.繁體中文:
Mojang 為了保護兒童及其隱私權施行了許多政策，包含《兒童線上隱私保護法》(COPPA) 與《一般資料保護規則》(GDPR)。

您在存取 Realms 帳號之前可能需要取得家長的同意。

如果您擁有較舊的 Minecraft 帳號（以使用者名稱登入），您必須將帳號轉移為 Mojang 帳號以使用 Realms。

languages.简体中文:
此世界已成功升级到当前版本，现在可以在世界列表中找到。
我们在清理过时数据时遇到了问题，因此世界文件夹名称已更改为%s。
languages.繁體中文:
這個世界已成功升級至目前版本，現在可於世界清單中查看。

languages.English: Someone is shaming, attacking, or bullying you or someone else. This includes when someone is repeatedly trying to contact you or someone else without consent or posting private personal information about you or someone else without consent ("doxing").
languages.简体中文: 有人羞辱、攻击、霸凌你或其他人。这包括在未经允许的情况下不断尝试联系你或其他人，或发布你或其他人的隐私信息。
languages.繁體中文: 有人羞辱、攻擊、霸凌你或其他人。包含違反您或其他人意願，不斷聯絡騷擾或是散布個人資料（即「肉搜」）。

languages.English: You have been idle for too long!
Understanding the context behind receiving an advancement can help us better understand and improve the progression of the game.
languages.简体中文: 了解达成进度前后发生的事情有助于我们更好了解及改进游戏流程。
languages.繁體中文: 了解達成進度後發生的事情，有利於我們更好了解並改進遊戲過程。

languages.English: Pipe Networks can now endlessly draw the assigned fluid from the tank

languages.English: Once Again, if an output is unable to take more items, it will be skipped

languages.繁體中文: 如果該組隧道內某個輸出口無法再輸出物品，則該輸出口會被跳過

languages.English: 'Randomize' will distribute whole stacks to randomly picked outputs
languages.简体中文: “随机”会随机选择一个输出端，一次性分配整堆物品
languages.繁體中文: 「隨機輸出」 模式會隨機選擇同組隧道的一個輸出口輸出

languages.English:
Provide custom functionality when the image is clicked:
• Open a page or file with http://, https:// or file:/// URL
• Run a command with 'command:<cmd>'
• Jump to a quest with '#<quest_id>' (use Copy ID to get quest id's)
• Fire a CustomClickEvent (for KubeJS or other mods) with 'custom:<resource_location>'
languages.简体中文:
点击图片时触发自定义功能：
• 通过http://、https://或file:/// URL打开页面
• 使用'command:<指令>'运行命令
• 使用'#<任务ID>'跳转到任务（使用复制ID获取任务ID）
• 触发CustomClickEvent（供KubeJS或其他模组使用）'custom:<资源定位符>'
languages.繁體中文:
Provide custom functionality when the image is clicked:
• Open a page or file with http://, https:// or file:/// URL
• Run a command with 'command:<cmd>'
• Jump to a quest with '#<quest_id>' (use Copy ID to get quest id's)
• Fire a CustomClickEvent (for KubeJS or other mods) with 'custom:<resource_location>'

languages.简体中文: Not closing the menu when hopping to a waypoint (left-clicking in the menu)
languages.繁體中文: Not closing the menu when hopping to a waypoint (left-clicking in the menu)

languages.简体中文: Embeddium 检测到已安装的模组中有些可能会导致渲染问题或崩溃。建议卸载它们。请参考以下列表。
languages.繁體中文: Embeddium detected the presence of mods that are known to cause rendering issues/crashes. It is recommended to uninstall them. See the list below.

涂蜡的斑驳切制铜楼梯

languages.简体中文: 软管滑轮的抽取/排放速度取决于连接管道中流体的流速

languages.简体中文: ……或者提供吸力来抽取世界中的流体

languages.简体中文: 连接的管道可以将流体输入到软管滑轮中，软管会在下方排出口处放置流体源……

languages.繁體中文: 儲物倉可用於儲存大量物品

languages.繁體中文: 指令包含非預期的或是遺漏的指令引數簽章。

languages.简体中文: 在这个选项卡中选中的实体根本不会被剔除。这主要用于客户端实体，或者那些无论是否可见都需要被渲染的实体。
languages.繁體中文: 這個頁籤中選擇的實體完全不會被剔除。這主要用於用戶端實體，或者那些無論是否可見都需要被繪製的實體。

languages.English: Ultimining will stop if the equipped tool has this much damage or less remaining. Setting this to 0 allows tools to break.
languages.简体中文: Ultimining will stop if the equipped tool has this much damage or less remaining. Setting this to 0 allows tools to break.
languages.繁體中文: Ultimining will stop if the equipped tool has this much damage or less remaining. Setting this to 0 allows tools to break.

languages.English: Set this to true to remove any Entity that throws an error in its update method instead of closing the server and reporting a crash log. BE WARNED THIS COULD SCREW UP EVERYTHING USE SPARINGLY WE ARE NOT RESPONSIBLE FOR DAMAGES.
languages.简体中文: 该项为true时会移除在更新时出现错误的实体，并非关闭服务端并生成崩溃日志。警告：这可能会产生很严重的后果。请谨慎使用，我们不会对任何损失负责。
languages.繁體中文: 將此設為 true 以刪除所有在更新時發生錯誤的實體，而非關閉伺服器並產生崩潰記錄。 注意：這可能會搞砸一切，請謹慎使用，我們不對任何損害負責。

languages.English: Stopped tick profiling after %s seconds and %s ticks (%s ticks per second)

languages.繁體中文: 已停止刻點分析，共耗時 %s 秒和 %s 刻（每秒 %s 刻）

languages.繁體中文: 火車可以順利的通過未被載入的區域

languages.简体中文: 一旦靠近玩家，列车将重新出现
languages.繁體中文: 一旦接近玩家火車將重新出現

languages.简体中文: 但是，钻头和其他机载机器将无法运行
languages.繁體中文: 但是機械鑽頭與其他車載機器會停止運作

languages.English: Turn on rain to see the fertilizer model!

%1$s suffocated in a wall whilst fighting %2$s

languages.繁體中文: 對放置於工作盆內的物品進行衝壓，可以將這些物品壓縮在一起

languages.简体中文: 压缩意指任何同种物品填满了 2×2 或者 3×3 网格的配方，以及一些额外的配方
languages.繁體中文: 壓縮意指任何同種物品填滿了 2x2 或者 3x3 網格的配方，以及一些額外的配方

languages.繁體中文: 一些配方可能需要烈焰使者燃燒室提供熱量

languages.繁體中文: 過濾槽可用於解決兩個配方相互衝突的情況

languages.English: _Kinetic components_ show added _Stress Impact_ or _Capacity_. _Stressometers_ show statistics of their _attached kinetic network_. Some other blocks reveal information such as item and fluid content.
languages.简体中文: _动力组件_显示_应力影响_或_应力量_。_应力表_显示_当前动力网络_内的应力信息。一些其他方块显示例如内含物品和流体的信息。
languages.繁體中文: _動力元件_會顯示_應力影響_或_應力量_。_應力表_會顯示_當前連接的動能網絡_的動力訊息，其他一些方塊會顯示諸如物品和流體的訊息。

languages.English: Hostile mobs spawn but deal less damage. Hunger bar depletes and drains health down to 5 hearts.
languages.简体中文: 敌对生物会生成，但伤害较低。生命值在饥饿值耗尽后最终会降至5颗心。
languages.繁體中文: 生成的敵對生物攻擊力較低。生命值會因為飢餓值耗盡而降低至 5 顆心。

languages.English: %1$s was killed by magic whilst trying to escape %2$s
languages.简体中文: %1$s在试图逃离%2$s时被魔法杀死了
languages.繁體中文: %1$s 在試圖逃離 %2$s 時被魔法殺死了

Watch an item move across a row of Item Drains

目睹一个物品滚过一排分液池
§7（隐藏进度）
languages.繁體中文:
看著一個物品經過一整排分液池

languages.English:
Knowing the overall performance profile of Minecraft helps us tune and optimize the game for a wide range of machine specifications and operating systems. 
Game version is included to help us compare the performance profile for new versions of Minecraft.
languages.简体中文:
了解Minecraft的整体性能概况，可以帮助我们针对各种机型和操作系统调整与优化游戏。 
游戏版本信息也包含在其中，以帮助我们比较Minecraft新版本的性能概况。
languages.繁體中文:
了解 Minecraft 整體的效能概況，可以幫助我們針對各類裝置及作業系統調整並改進遊戲。 
遊戲版本資訊也包含在內，以便我們比較新版本 Minecraft 的效能概況。

languages.English: Shows information about what you are looking at.
languages.简体中文: 显示你眼前物体的信息。
languages.繁體中文: Shows information about what you are looking at.

languages.简体中文: 显示_当前时间_，并且一天会咕咕两次。_中午_咕咕一次，_黄昏可以睡觉_的时候咕咕一次。

languages.English: Elevator Contacts emit a signal while the cabin is on their floor

languages.English: Minecraft will soon require a 64-bit system, which will prevent you from playing or using Realms on this device. You will need to manually cancel any Realms subscription.
languages.简体中文: Minecraft不久后需要64位系统才能运行，届时你将无法使用该设备进行游戏或使用Realms服务。你需要自行取消所有Realms订阅。
languages.繁體中文: Minecraft 在不久後僅支援 64 位元系統，您將無法在此裝置遊玩或使用 Realms。您需要自行取消 Realms 的任何訂閱。

languages.English: Any redstone contact sharing this column will be converted

languages.繁體中文: 此成分在繪製時當機。請查看客戶端記錄檔以獲取詳細資訊。

languages.简体中文: 缺少方块属性。属性%s应为%s
languages.繁體中文: 缺少方塊屬性。屬性 %s 應為 %s

languages.English: Force the use of System.nanoTime instead of glfwGetTime as the main client Time provider.
languages.简体中文: 强制使用 System.nanoTime 而不是 glfwGetTime 作为主要的客户端时间提供者。
languages.繁體中文: 強制使用 System.nanoTime 作為用戶端時間標準而非 glfwGetTime。

languages.English: Custom bossbar %s has changed maximum to %s
languages.简体中文: 自定义Boss栏%s的最大值已改为%s
languages.繁體中文: 已將自訂 Boss 狀態條 %s 的最大值變更為 %s

languages.English: When a sign is placed on a packager..
languages.简体中文: 当一个告示牌被放置在打包机上时……
languages.繁體中文: 當告示牌被放置於包裹裝卸站上時......

languages.English: Created packages will carry the written lines of text as their address
languages.简体中文: 打包完毕的包裹将会携带一行写有其地址的文字
languages.繁體中文: 製作的包裹會帶有一行地址文本

languages.English: Package filters route packages based on their address
languages.简体中文: 包裹过滤器根据包裹的地址制定它们的路线
languages.繁體中文: 包裹過濾器根據包裹的地址路由包裹

languages.English: Create, build, and explore without limits. You can fly, have endless materials, and can't be hurt by monsters.
languages.简体中文: 无拘无束地探索创造。可以飞行，材料取之不尽，且不受怪物伤害。
languages.繁體中文: 沒有限制地創造、建設與探索。你能夠飛行，使用無窮的材料，也不會被怪物傷害。

languages.简体中文: 已禁用队伍%s的友军伤害
languages.繁體中文: 已為隊伍 %s 關閉同隊相殘

languages.English: Catch a Fish... without a Fishing Rod!
languages.简体中文: 不用钓鱼竿抓住一条鱼！
即将完成兴趣点的升级…

languages.English: A number of options are applicable here
languages.简体中文: 有多种设备可以使得工作盆变为该形态
languages.繁體中文: 有多種設備可以引發工作盆的這種行為

languages.English: When a valid component is present, the Basin will show an output faucet
languages.简体中文: 若在正确的位置上放置了有效的组件，工作盆会显示出一个输出口
languages.繁體中文: 若在正確的位置上放置了有效的組件，工作盆會顯示出一個輸出龍頭

languages.English: Without output faucet, the Basin will retain items created in its processing
languages.简体中文: 如果输出口没有显示，那么盆内的产物将会一直留存在盆内
languages.繁體中文: 如果沒有顯示出輸出龍頭，那麼盆內的產物將會一直留存在盆內

languages.English: Outputs will be caught by the inventory below
languages.简体中文: 产物会被输出到盆下方的容器内
languages.繁體中文: 產物會被輸出到盆子下方的容器內

languages.English: Desired outputs will then have to be extracted from the basin
languages.简体中文: 需要输出的产物仍需从盆内取出
languages.繁體中文: 需要輸出的產物仍需從盆內取出

languages.English: This can be useful if outputs should be re-used as ingredients
languages.简体中文: 这在产物需要作为新一轮处理的原料时相当有用
languages.繁體中文: 這在產物需要作為新一輪處理的原料時相當有用

languages.English: A Filter might be necessary to avoid pulling out un-processed items
languages.简体中文: 你可能需要过滤器来避免未被处理的物品被输出出去
languages.繁體中文: 加裝過濾器可防止未被處理的物品輸出

languages.English: Toggle off to make missing model text in the gui fit inside the slot.
languages.简体中文: 关闭此选项在GUI中遗失模型文本适配槽位。
languages.繁體中文: 關閉此選項以使遺失模型的提示文字吻合 GUI。

languages.English: After a processing step, basins try to output below to the side of them
languages.简体中文: 处理完毕后，工作盆会尝试从它的侧面向下方输出
languages.繁體中文: 處理完畢後，工作盆會嘗試從它下方的側面輸出

languages.English: A Basin can hold Items and Fluids for Processing
languages.简体中文: 一个可以对放入的物品以及流体进行处理的盆
languages.繁體中文: 一個可以對放入的物品以及流體進行處理的盆

languages.English: Threshold Switches can read from these blocks, as well as most item and fluid containers.
languages.简体中文: 存量转信器能从这些方块中读取信息，包括大多数物品与流体容器。
languages.繁體中文: 儲量偵測器能從這些方塊中讀取信息，包括大多數物品與流體容器。

languages.简体中文: 当有歌曲开始播放时显示弹窗。歌曲正在播放时，会在游戏暂停菜单中持续显示同一弹窗。
languages.繁體中文: 當歌曲開始播放時會顯示通知。歌曲播放時，遊戲中的暫停選單也會持續顯示相同的通知。

languages.English: Toggles between survival and creative mode
languages.简体中文: 在生存模式和创造模式间切换
languages.繁體中文: Toggles between survival and creative mode

languages.English:
Automatically swaps item in player's hand for the one effective on the block/entity when these are left clicked.
Has filter options and enables swapping wrench like tools for block/entity player is looking at with %s
languages.简体中文:
左击时自动将玩家手持物品替换为对应方块/实体的挖掘或攻击工具
具有过滤选项，并可按%s手动替换工具
languages.繁體中文:
左擊時自動將玩家手持物品替換為對應方塊/實體的挖掘或攻擊工具
具有過濾選項，並可按%s手動替換工具

languages.简体中文: 已剥夺%2$s名玩家的%1$s条配方
languages.繁體中文: 已移除 %2$s 個玩家的 %1$s 條合成配方

languages.English:
Only applies if Invisible is true.
If > 0, quest becomes visible if X or more tasks are completed.
languages.简体中文:
仅在“不可见”开启时生效。
若>0，当完成X个或更多任务时任务可见。
languages.繁體中文:
Only applies if Invisible is true.
If > 0, quest becomes visible if X or more tasks are completed.

languages.English: The network behind is now pulling fluids...
languages.简体中文: 泵后的管道网络正在抽取流体……
languages.繁體中文: 在他後面的網路現在可以抽取流體…

languages.English: ...while the network in front is transferring it outward
languages.简体中文: ……而泵前的网络则在排放流体

languages.English: The pumps direction is unaffected by the input rotation
languages.简体中文: 动力泵的方向不受旋转方向的影响
languages.繁體中文: 機械幫浦的方向不受旋轉方向影響

languages.English: Instead, a Wrench can be used to reverse the direction
languages.简体中文: 取而代之的是，可以使用扳手来反转方向
languages.繁體中文: 取而代之的是，可以使用扳手来反轉方向

languages.简体中文: 在升级标签页中添加一个铁砧

languages.English: Logistics Networks and the Stock Link
languages.简体中文: 物流网络和仓储链接站

languages.English: Failed to save schematic, check logs for details
languages.简体中文: 蓝图保存失败，请查阅日志以获取详细信息。
languages.繁體中文: 藍圖保存失敗，請檢查日誌以獲取詳細信息。

languages.简体中文: 锈蚀的涂蜡铜砖瓦台阶
languages.繁體中文: 上蠟的風化銅磚瓦半磚

languages.English: -> Allow passage if section fully traversable
languages.简体中文: -> 如果区间可穿过则允许通行
languages.繁體中文: -> 若區間可穿越則允許通行

languages.English: Granted criterion '%s' of advancement %s to %s players
languages.简体中文: 已将进度%2$s的达成条件“%1$s”赋予%3$s名玩家
languages.繁體中文: 已將進度 %2$s 的條件 '%1$s' 給予 %3$s 個玩家

languages.简体中文: 用斧刮削铜灯来让它变得更亮
languages.繁體中文: 用斧頭為銅燈除鏽使其更加明亮

languages.English: You can also choose to download the world to singleplayer.
languages.简体中文: 你可以选择将世界下载至单人模式中。
languages.繁體中文: 你也可以下載此地圖到單人遊戲

languages.English: Please reset or select another world.
languages.简体中文: 请重置或选择另一个世界。
languages.繁體中文: 請重設或選擇另一個世界。

languages.English: Mechanical Pumps govern the flow of their attached pipe networks
languages.简体中文: 动力泵可以控制管道网络中的流体
languages.繁體中文: 機械幫浦為與其連接的管線提供動力

languages.English: Their arrow indicates the direction of flow
languages.简体中文: 其上的箭头指示流体流向

languages.English: Bogeys %1$s and %2$s are too close to each other
languages.简体中文: 转向架 %1$s 和 %2$s 距离太近
languages.繁體中文: 轉向架 %1$s 及 %2$s 距離過近

languages.English: Marked %s chunks in %s from %s to %s to be force loaded
languages.简体中文: 已将%2$s中的%3$s至%4$s间的%1$s个区块标记为强制加载
languages.繁體中文: 已將 %2$s 中 %3$s 到 %4$s 之間的 %1$s 個區塊標記為常駐區塊

languages.English: Shop owner must set a price first

languages.简体中文: 不是一个有效的数字！（浮点数）
languages.繁體中文: 不是有效的數字！（浮點數）

languages.English: %1$s fell too far and was finished by %2$s
languages.简体中文: %1$s摔伤得太重并被%2$s完结了生命

languages.English: (Made for a newer version of Minecraft)
Some recipes will require additional Crafters to bridge gaps in the path
languages.简体中文: 有些配方需要额外的合成器，来补足合成通路上的间隙
languages.繁體中文: 有些配方需要額外的合成器，來補足合成通路上的間隙

languages.English: Place and power a set of Crushing Wheels
languages.简体中文: 放置一对粉碎轮并为其供能
languages.繁體中文: 放置一對粉碎輪並為其提供動力

languages.English: Shared Inputs created with the Wrench at the back can also reach across covered Crafters
languages.简体中文: 使用扳手在背面创建的的共享输入也可以跨越有盖的合成器
languages.繁體中文: 被蓋住的合成器並不會阻斷共享輸入端的影響

languages.English: Using Slot Covers, Crafters can be set to act as an Empty Slot in the arrangement
languages.简体中文: 使用合成槽盖板，合成器在合成时的行为就如同一个空的合成槽位
languages.繁體中文: 使用合成槽蓋板，合成器會在合成進行時的行為就如同一個空的合成槽位
上蠟的風化切製銅方塊

languages.简体中文: 已更改%s个实体在%s中的数字格式
languages.繁體中文: 已變更 %s 個實體在 %s 中的數字格式

languages.English: A force loaded chunk was found in %s at: %s
languages.简体中文: 在%s内找到一个强制加载的区块：%s
languages.繁體中文: 從 %s 中找到一個常駐區塊：%s

languages.English: %1$s went off with a bang whilst fighting %2$s
languages.简体中文: %1$s在与%2$s战斗时随着一声巨响消失了
languages.繁體中文: %1$s 在與 %2$s 戰鬥時隨著爆炸逝去

languages.English: Sneak + Right-Click a Task Screen block to bind
languages.简体中文: 潜行+右键点击任务屏幕方块以绑定
languages.繁體中文: Sneak + Right-Click a Task Screen block to bind

languages.English: Encountered malformed payload while sending your report.
languages.简体中文: 发送举报时遇到了格式错误的负载。
languages.繁體中文: 提交檢舉時遭遇格式錯誤的訊息承載。

languages.English: You are now an ally of '%s'!
languages.简体中文: You are now an ally of '%s'!
languages.繁體中文: You are now an ally of '%s'!
正在轉移 %s 個玩家至 %s:%s

languages.简体中文: 传送石碑经验花费倍率
languages.繁體中文: 傳送石碑所需經驗成本倍率

languages.English: Changed the display name of %s to %s
languages.简体中文: 已将%s的显示名称更改为%s
languages.繁體中文: 已將 %s 的顯示名稱更改為 %s

languages.English: You are already in a party!
languages.简体中文: You are already in a party!
languages.繁體中文: You are already in a party!

languages.English: '%s' will be lost forever! (A long time!)

languages.简体中文: 收到了包含非法玩家移动的数据包
languages.繁體中文: 接收到無效的玩家移動封包

languages.简体中文: 在结构中使用动力钻头
languages.繁體中文: 在裝置中使用機械鑽頭

languages.English: You can sleep only at night or during thunderstorms
languages.简体中文: 你只能在夜间或雷暴中入眠
languages.繁體中文: 你只能在晚上或暴風雨中入睡

languages.简体中文: 从战利品表%2$s中掉落了%1$s个物品
languages.繁體中文: 從戰利品表 %2$s 中掉落 %1$s 個物品

languages.English: World border cannot be smaller than 1 block wide
languages.简体中文: 世界边界的宽度不能小于1格
languages.繁體中文: 世界邊界不能小於 1 格寬

languages.English: Frontmost Bogey must be at Station Marker
languages.简体中文: 最前面的转向架必须位于车站标记处
languages.繁體中文: 最前方的轉向架需位於車站標記處

languages.简体中文: 跳过被剔除的 Tick 更新

languages.繁體中文: 衝壓機: 撞擊輸送帶

languages.English: Must be an opped player in creative mode
languages.简体中文: 必须是处于创造模式的管理员
languages.繁體中文: 必須是創造模式中的管理員

languages.简体中文: 世界文件夹包含符号链接
languages.繁體中文: 世界資料夾包含符號連結

languages.English:
Your graphics device is detected as unsupported for the %s graphics option.

You may ignore this and continue, however support will not be provided for your device if you choose to use %s graphics.
languages.简体中文:
检测到你的图形设备不支持%s画质选项。

你可以忽略此提示并继续，但如果你依然选择使用%s画质，你的设备将不会受到支持。
languages.繁體中文:
您的繪圖裝置被檢測出不受 %s 畫質選項支援。

您可以忽略這則訊息，但是若您選擇 %s 畫質將不會為您的裝置提供支援。

languages.English: Empty hand required to start a shopping list
languages.简体中文: 空手右击以获取采购清单
languages.繁體中文: 空手點擊以獲取購物清單

languages.简体中文: “execute as”等命令可以使用的上下文数量最大值。
languages.繁體中文: 「execute as」等指令使用的上下文最大數量。

languages.English: Set to true if experience cost should be inverted, meaning the shorter the distance, the more expensive. Can be used to encourage other methods for short-distance travel.
languages.简体中文: Set to true if experience cost should be inverted, meaning the shorter the distance, the more expensive. Can be used to encourage other methods for short-distance travel.
languages.繁體中文: Set to true if experience cost should be inverted, meaning the shorter the distance, the more expensive. Can be used to encourage other methods for short-distance travel.

languages.English: Schematic failed to Load - Check Game Logs
languages.简体中文: 蓝图加载失败 - 请检查游戏日志
languages.繁體中文: 藍圖載入失敗 - 請檢查遊戲記錄檔

languages.English: Controls resource drops from mobs, including experience orbs.
languages.简体中文: 控制生物是否掉落资源，包括经验球。
languages.繁體中文: 控制生物資源掉落，包含經驗球。

languages.English: It’s important for us to understand how long it takes to join a world, and how that changes over time. For example, when we add new features or do larger technical changes, we need to see what impact that had on load times.
languages.简体中文: 对我们而言，了解加入世界所需的时长，以及这一时长随着时间推移会如何变化是很重要的。比如，当我们加入新功能或进行较大的技术更改时，我们需要知道这对加载时间有何影响。
languages.繁體中文: 對我們而言，了解加入世界所需的時長，以及此時長隨時間推移的變化情形是十分重要的。舉例來說，當我們加入新功能或是進行較大的技術性改動時，我們會需要這些資訊來了解這些改動對載入時間有何影響。

languages.简体中文: 无效或未知的游戏模式“%s”
languages.繁體中文: 無效或未知的遊戲模式 '%s'

languages.English: Kill one of every hostile monster
languages.简体中文: 杀死每一种敌对性怪物
languages.繁體中文: 殺死每種敵對怪物各一隻

languages.简体中文: 使用重锤一击造成50颗心的伤害
languages.繁體中文: 使用重錘一擊造成50顆心的傷害

languages.English: The multiplier applied to the base xp cost when teleporting from one sharestone to another.
languages.简体中文: The multiplier applied to the base xp cost when teleporting from one sharestone to another.
languages.繁體中文: The multiplier applied to the base xp cost when teleporting from one sharestone to another.

languages.English: Trigger an automatic package request using Factory Gauges
languages.简体中文: 使用工厂仪表建设自动化打包流水线
languages.繁體中文: 使用工廠控制片觸發一次自動打包

languages.English: JEI (Hovering With Mouse Over Config Button)
languages.简体中文: JEI（将鼠标悬停在配置按钮上）
languages.繁體中文: JEI（將游標懸停在設定按鈕上）

languages.English: For a valid setup, all paths have to converge into one exit at any side
languages.简体中文: 所有的合成通路必须汇集到任意一侧的一个出口，整套合成器方可算是设置正确
languages.繁體中文: 所有的合成通路必須匯集到任意一側的一個出口，整套合成器方可算是設置正確

languages.English: The outputs will be placed into the inventory at the exit
languages.简体中文: 输出产物会被放入位于出口的容器中
languages.繁體中文: 輸出產物會被放入位於出口的儲存空間中

languages.English: Mechanical Crafters require Rotational Force to operate
languages.简体中文: 动力合成器的运转需要旋转力的供应
languages.繁體中文: 機械合成器的運轉需要動力的供應

languages.English: Right-Click the front to insert Items manually
languages.简体中文: 右击合成器正面，可以手动放入物品
languages.繁體中文: 右鍵合成器正面，可以手動放入物品

languages.English: Once every slot of a path contains an Item, the crafting process will begin
languages.简体中文: 一旦合成通路上的所有合成槽位都有了物品，合成就会开始
languages.繁體中文: 一旦合成通路上的所有合成槽位都有了物品，合成就會開始

languages.English: For recipes not fully occupying the crafter setup, the start can be forced using a Redstone Pulse
languages.简体中文: 而对于那些没有完全占满所有合成器槽位的配方，你可以通入红石信号强制开启合成
languages.繁體中文: 而對於那些沒有完全占滿所有合成器槽位的配方，你可以輸入紅石訊號強制啟動合成

languages.English: An array of Mechanical Crafters can be used to automate any Crafting Recipe
languages.简体中文: 动力合成器阵列可用于自动化任何合成配方的制作
languages.繁體中文: 機械合成器陣列可用於自動化任何合成配方的製作

languages.English: Using a Wrench, the Crafters' paths can be arranged
languages.简体中文: 使用扳手可以调控合成器的合成通路
languages.繁體中文: 使用扳手可以調控合成器的合成通路

languages.English: Components which help manage distributed item storage and automated requests around your factory
languages.简体中文: 这些组件可以帮助你管理工厂中的物品库存分发与自动化请求
languages.繁體中文: 這些組件可以幫助你管理工廠中的物品庫存分發與自動化請求
介於 {0} 與 {1} 之間（包含同版本）

languages.简体中文: 显示链接器的输出目标

languages.English: After no items have been exchanged for a while, the contraption will continue on its way
languages.简体中文: 如果一小段时间内没有物品交换，接口将会断开连接，动态结构将会重新开始运动
languages.繁體中文: 物品交換完畢後，裝置仍然會停留在原地一小會，然後才會繼續前行

languages.简体中文: ……或是从动态结构中提取出来
物品可被输入到动态结构内……
languages.繁體中文: 物品會被輸入到裝置內…

languages.English: While engaged, the stationary interface will represent ALL inventories on the contraption
languages.简体中文: 接口连接状态下，固定端的接口便会作为整个动态结构物品存储的代理
languages.繁體中文: 連接狀態下，固定側介面便會作為整個裝置的儲存空間代理

languages.English: Whenever they pass by each other, they will engage in a connection
languages.简体中文: 当它们彼此经过时，它们会连接在一起
languages.繁體中文: 當它們彼此經過時，它們會連接在一起

languages.English: Place a second one with a gap of 1 or 2 blocks inbetween
languages.简体中文: 放置第二个接口时，记得要与动态结构上的接口相隔 1 到 2 格的距离
languages.繁體中文: 放置第二個介面時，記得要與裝置介面相隔 1 格或者 2 格的距離

languages.English: This component can interact with storage without the need to stop the contraption.
languages.简体中文: 这一方块可以在不停止动态结构的情况下与动态结构内的容器进行交互。
languages.繁體中文: 這一組件可以在不停止裝置的情況下與裝置內的儲存空間進行互動

languages.English: Moving inventories can be tricky to access with automation.
languages.简体中文: 动态结构上的容器可能很难自动化存取。
languages.繁體中文: 移動裝置上的容器可能很難做到自動化存取

languages.English:
The size, in regions, of a square image equivalent to the resolution that a large exported map will be scaled down to if necessary. For example, 20x20 stands for 400 regions, 512x512 blocks/pixels each. The resulting image doesn't have to be a square. 10x40 is also 400 regions. 
 
 Your computer or the Java heap size might not be able to handle higher export resolutions.
languages.简体中文:
The size, in regions, of a square image equivalent to the resolution that a large exported map will be scaled down to if necessary. For example, 20x20 stands for 400 regions, 512x512 blocks/pixels each. The resulting image doesn't have to be a square. 10x40 is also 400 regions. 
 
 Your computer or the Java heap size might not be able to handle higher export resolutions.
languages.繁體中文:
The size, in regions, of a square image equivalent to the resolution that a large exported map will be scaled down to if necessary. For example, 20x20 stands for 400 regions, 512x512 blocks/pixels each. The resulting image doesn't have to be a square. 10x40 is also 400 regions. 
 
 Your computer or the Java heap size might not be able to handle higher export resolutions.

languages.English: An unexpected HTTP error occurred while sending your report.
languages.简体中文: 发送举报时发生了意外的HTTP错误。
languages.繁體中文: 提交檢舉時發生了非預期的 HTTP 錯誤。

languages.English: Teleport to any other Light Blue Sharestone
languages.简体中文: 传送到其他任意的淡蓝色共享石碑
languages.繁體中文: 傳送至其他淺藍色專用石碑

languages.English:
Knowing how players play Minecraft (such as Game Mode, client or server modded, and game version) allows us to focus game updates to improve the areas that players care about most.
The World Loaded event is paired with the World Unloaded event to calculate how long the play session has lasted.
languages.简体中文:
了解玩家玩Minecraft时的细节（例如游戏模式、客户端或服务端是否被修改，以及游戏版本）有助于我们在游戏更新时注重改进玩家最关心的部分。
世界加载事件将同世界卸载事件一起用于计算游戏会话的持续时长。
languages.繁體中文:
了解玩家如何遊玩 Minecraft （例如遊戲模式、伺服器和用戶端是否為原版、遊戲版本等資訊），可以讓我們專注於遊戲更新，用來改善玩家最關心的地方。
世界載入事件和世界卸載事件一起用於計算遊戲時間。

languages.English: Restocks backpack from sneak right clicked inventory
languages.简体中文: 手持背包潜行右击容器提取物品
languages.繁體中文: 手持背包潛行右擊容器提取物品
檢舉服務目前無法使用

languages.繁體中文: 購買已取消：空間不足以儲存貨幣

languages.English: Show the note and instrument of the note block.
languages.简体中文: 显示音符盒的音高和乐器。
languages.繁體中文: Show the note and instrument of the note block.

languages.简体中文: 聊天功能受限。点击此消息查看详情。
languages.繁體中文: 聊天功能受限。點擊這個訊息以查看詳細資訊。

languages.繁體中文: 您已經遊玩超過 24 小時

languages.繁體中文: 您有一份聊天訊息檢舉草稿，如果離開，將遺失您的草稿
